note: Real starter IT-documentation templates. Plain markdown with Obsidian-compatible YAML frontmatter. NEVER includes a field for a password/secret value — credential pages link to an external vault by item URL only.

templates.name: Server / VM asset page
templates.body:
---
type: server
hostname: 
client: 
location: 
role: 
os: 
ip: 
serial: 
warranty_expires: 
criticality: medium
source: manual
---

# {{hostname}}

## Overview
What this server does and who depends on it.

## Specs
- **OS:** 
- **CPU / RAM / Disk:** 
- **IP / VLAN:** 
- **Backup:** see [[Backup & Recovery Runbook]]

## Access
> Credentials are NOT stored here. Open the vault item: `vault://<provider>/<item-id>` (see Credential reference pattern).

## Dependencies
- Depends on: [[Core Firewall]]
- Used by: 

## Notes & change history
-

## When to use this
The trigger / symptom that brings someone here.

## Prerequisites

- Tools needed

## Procedure
1. 
2.

Who to call and when.

templates.name: Credential reference (NO secrets)
templates.body:
---
type: credential-ref
client: 
vault_provider: bitwarden
vault_item_url: 
---

# Credential reference — {{title}}

> **Ledger stores ZERO secret material.** This page only *points to* the credential in your password manager. Use a password manager (Bitwarden / 1Password / Keeper / Vaultwarden) and link the item below.

- **Vault:** Bitwarden / 1Password / Keeper / Vaultwarden
- **Item:** `vault://<provider>/<item-id>`  ·  open in the vault app
- **Who can access:** (role / group)
- **Rotation cadence:** 
- **Last rotated:** 

## What it unlocks
- [[Server name]] admin console

## NEVER paste the password, key, or seed here.
If you find a secret pasted into any Ledger page, remove it and move it to the vault.

templates.name: Onboarding / offboarding procedure
templates.body:
---
type: procedure
client: 
kind: onboarding
---

# {{kind}} procedure — {{client}}

## Identity
- [ ] Create / disable account in M365 / Google / Okta
- [ ] Group membership
- [ ] MFA enrolled / revoked

## Access
- [ ] Shared drives / apps
- [ ] VPN
- [ ] Credentials shared via vault (never email a password)

## Hardware
- [ ] Laptop assigned / collected
- [ ] MDM enrolled / wiped

## Final
- [ ] Mailbox delegated / converted
- [ ] Ticket closed
